---
name: 🛡️ Security Report
about: Report a vulnerability to help secure Fourier Contracts.
title: "[SECURITY] <Short description>"
labels: security
assignees: ''

---

**CRITICAL NOTE: DO NOT open a public issue for zero-day vulnerabilities or high-risk findings. Please refer to our Security Policy or email security@fourier.network directly.**

**Vulnerability Details**
Provide a detailed description of the security vulnerability:
- Affected component/contract
- Impact
- Exploit mechanism (if known)

**Proof of Concept (PoC)**
If safe and possible, provide code, tests, or steps to demonstrate the vulnerability.

**Suggested Remediation**
Any thoughts on how to fix or mitigate the issue.
